empathetic_output.support_response: Can you please give me just one moment more time while I check up on your order status? Thankfully, we do have some good news - our team has managed to locate your package that went missing in transit last week! It should reach you within the next two business days via UPS ground shipping at no additional cost to you. If you would prefer not waiting anymore, then yes, absolutely we can process a full refund as per company policy immediately upon receiving back all items purchased during this unfortunate incident. Please let me know what works best for you moving forward; either way
